name: Cameron Bus Svc
notes: No FMCSA record found for Cameron Bus, Cameron Bus Svc, or Cameron Bus Service in NY (SAFER keyword search returned no matching NY bus carriers). NY DOS / opengovny.com searches returned no corporation matching 'Cameron Bus' in Ozone Park or Queens; address 8148 102nd Rd, Ozone Park is a 2-4 unit residential property per Redfin/Zillow, suggesting an owner-operator or DBA registered under an individual's name rather than a formal NY corporate entity. Several other major Ozone Park bus operators (Logan Bus, Little Richie, Guardian Bus) are at 97-14 Atlantic Ave, not this address. Likely intrastate small-fleet/DBA; no USDOT, no NY DOS entity found.
